title: Private Yacht Charter
description: A curated fleet of vessels available exclusively to Patron and Member-tier guests. From sunset passages along the Lagos shoreline to multi-day open-water voyages.

title: Rooftop Observatory
description: The highest privately accessible point in the tower. No crowds. No reservations beyond your member key. Open 24 hours to resident members.

title: Private Cinema Suite
description: A 22-seat screening room with full concierge service. Request any title from our catalogue. In-suite dining available throughout the screening.

title: Polo & Equestrian
description: Access to a private equestrian facility 45 minutes from the tower. Lessons, recreational riding, and seasonal polo matches for members and their guests.

title: Longevity Programme
description: A 12-week bespoke protocol co-developed with leading longevity physicians. Biomarker profiling, personalised nutrition, structured recovery, and quarterly review.

title: Cryotherapy Suite
description: Whole-body cryotherapy chambers at -110°C. Routine sessions managed by certified recovery specialists. Walk-in availability for resident members.

title: Restorative Spa
description: Nine treatment rooms. Ancient therapeutic traditions alongside modern clinical protocols. Available seven days a week, 6am to midnight.

title: IV Therapy & Recovery
description: Medical-grade intravenous therapy administered in a private suite. Formulations designed for energy restoration, immune support, and performance recovery.

title: Private Wine Cellar Access
description: A curated collection spanning over 4,000 bottles across 23 countries. Monthly guided exploration sessions hosted by our resident sommelier.

title: Private Chef Experience
description: Your residence, your menu. Our culinary team develops a bespoke tasting experience for you and up to 14 guests. Pairing included.

title: Seasonal Tasting Events
description: Quarterly gatherings centred on a single terroir, producer, or culinary tradition. Invitation-only. Limited to 30 covers per event.

title: Executive Boardrooms
description: Five fully equipped private boardrooms with secure high-speed connectivity. Catering, translation, AV, and presentation support available on request.

title: Private Jet Coordination
description: Our concierge desk maintains relationships with three regional charter operators. Scheduling, ground logistics, and in-flight catering coordinated for you.

title: Dedicated Relationship Manager
description: A single point of contact for every aspect of your membership. Available by direct line, seven days a week.

title: Art Collection Tours
description: Private access to one of West Africa's most significant contemporary art collections. Guided tours available by appointment with curatorial commentary.

title: Curated Travel
description: Beyond Lagos. Our travel desk designs bespoke itineraries to global destinations, with introductions to reciprocal private clubs in 40 cities.

title: Patron Music Evenings
description: Intimate performances by invited artists in the tower's private salon. Quarterly gatherings for Patron-tier members and approved guests.

title: Literary Society
description: Monthly evenings with authors, thinkers, and practitioners across disciplines. One of the club's most enduring and intimate traditions.
